technologies.name: Google Analytics
technologies.evidence: We use third-party analytics tools which collect information which your browser sends when you visit our web page. Google Analytics: It collects and uses information as per Google’s privacy policy.
technologies.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions Google Analytics as a third-party analytics tool used by Crest Data.

technologies.name: HTML pages

technologies.reasoning: The text mentions HTML pages as part of the information collected about users' interactions with the website.

technologies.name: Cookies

technologies.name: IP address
technologies.evidence: Your computer hardware and software, IP address, browser type, domain names, the internet service provider (ISP), the files viewed on our site (e.g., HTML pages, graphics, etc.), operating system, clickstream data, access times and referring website addresses without access your identification
technologies.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions IP address as part of the information collected about users' devices.
